Article: Evangelion Battle Orchestra Portable Unlockables
[]: Evangelion: Battle Orchestra Portable Unlockables             Quote Post by God'sHumiliatedSon » Sat Jul 24, 2010 9:14 pm Hello everyone, does anyone know how to unlock all the characters in Battle Orchestra Portable? I can't find anything online. Thank you very much

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Fri Jul 30, 2010 5:48 am I have both the PS2 and PSP versions of the game but haven't had the chance to play either for terribly long so I only have a few characters unlocked. GameFAQs has how to unlock them on PS2, and as far as I've played on the PSP version the unlock methods carry over. As for the PSP exclusive characters however I can't be of any help I'm afraid.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Oct 20, 2010 8:04 pm Riotgear wrote: As for the PSP exclusive characters however I can't be of any help I'm afraid.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Oct 20, 2010 8:16 pm As far as I'm aware Rebuild 00 and 01 and Lilith are the new unlockable characters, I don't think Gunbuster's in the PSP version.

[]:             Quote Post by visionfactory » Thu Oct 21, 2010 12:17 am arael wrote: You at least do know how to play... I've been fighting with the damm Japanese writing... It took me 5 minutes to realize that the X=accept O=decline were reversed! WTF! Can u help me? A quick tutorial on what the eff does the menu says? Please?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Oct 21, 2010 6:39 pm visionfactory wrote: I think the menu goes this way... Story mode Rumble mode Practice mode Endless mode Shop

Article: Evangelion Battle Orchestra Portable Unlockables
 Fri Oct 22, 2010 1:36 am No, the TV series said something about scrapped Eva-05/06 ("Gogouki" was at least mentioned if not "rokugouki" too) that later became part of the MP Evas instead. Isn't Battle Orchestra NGE-based, just with some new movie elements? (eg: Mari, Eva-05, NME-Lilith.)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Oct 22, 2010 1:57 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: No, the TV series said something about scrapped Eva-05/06 ("Gogouki" was at least mentioned if not "rokugouki" too) that later became part of the MP Evas instead. Isn't Battle Orchestra NGE-based, just with some new movie elements? (eg: Mari, Eva-05, NME-Lilith.)
